request: Wire proof run action to the real Abando recovery runtime path so the system can execute a controlled proof attempt, send a real message, log evidence, and return proof status.
goal: Connect Proof Run → Abando Worker → Send Real Message → Log → Return Proof without marking proof as PROVEN until runtime evidence confirms full loop.
required_flow: call existing runtime path from proof route
send real message only through provider-backed path
write proof artifact with request, response, evidence, and remaining gaps
return structured proof result to UI
non_goals: Do not mark proof_abando_recovery_loop as PROVEN.
Do not fabricate checkout or conversion evidence.
Do not rewrite Abando recovery engine.
Do not add a new send system.
Do not change Shopify app runtime behavior.

checks: runtime send path is identified before patch

required_runtime_evidence: checkout event or eligible recovery input found
real email or SMS send attempted through configured provider

next_action: Inspect existing Abando runtime routes before wiring proof route.
